_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: YAP/TAZ accumulated almost exclusively in the nuclei of these cells even if they were confluent, silencing of DCAF1 provoked almost complete YAP/TAZ extrusion to the cytoplasm
details: YAP/TAZ accumulated almost exclusively in the nuclei even when confluent, but silencing of DCAF1 provoked almost complete YAP/TAZ extrusion to the cytoplasm
